blockingIssues.description: The performance optimization feature still initializes desktop users into `globe` mode (`src/stores/uiStore.js`), and `App.jsx` immediately renders `<Globe />` in that mode. That means the heavy `vendor-globe` / Three.js chunk is still downloaded on a fresh desktop load instead of being deferred until the user explicitly opts into the globe, so the milestone misses the intended first-load optimization.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a manual-review fallback path for scrutiny validators when `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` Task launches fail, including which review artifacts to write and how to record the infrastructure problem in synthesis output.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All three reviewer Task launches in the polish scrutiny run failed immediately with `Invalid model: custom:GPT-5.4-(XHigh)-3`, so the validator had to produce the review JSON files manually in order to complete the milestone review.
